title: Black n' White BW Pack
description:
Hey there, 
this is a full equipped Bedwars 1.8.9 Texture Pack with almost every important item you need edited.
body:
A full equipped bedwars 1.8.9 Texture Pack!

With almost every item for bedwars needed edited:

Blocks: Clear glass, endstone, bed, all wool colours and clay.
1.21+ Ore blocks and block of (ore type)

Items:
Wood Sword, Stone Sword, Iron Sword, Gold Sword, Diamond Sword.
Same with all pickaxes and Axes!!!
New enderpearl!
New Shears!
Better Rod!
Better bucket of Lava and Water!
Gold, Iron, Diamond and emerald edited!
Apple, Golden Apple, Fireball and Stick edited!
All the new Armour in item edited too!

GUI:
slightly changed gui for Gmc and Gms, for the most important things, for example Villagers.

Sky:
Also new custom black yellow moon sky!
